channel.title: Bounty Radar Pro — Public Feed
channel.description: Multi-ecosystem ZK + AI bounty firehose. Updated every 30 min.

item.title: [$7] [BOUNTY: up to 50 RTC] Micro Liquidity — Provide Liquidity, Get 1.5x Back
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: Scottcjn/rustchain-bounties | Score: 0.01 merge probability

item.title: [$15] [PROGRAM] RustChain Digital Ambassador — Paid in RTC (Humans Only, Verified via Google Meet)
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: Scottcjn/rustchain-bounties | Score: 0.5 merge probability

item.title: [$10000] [$10,000] - Sustainable Cities
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: blockchainforsocialimpact/incubator | Score: 0.45 merge probability

item.title: [$7000] Coding Stablecoin Yield Strategy for DeFi 401(k)
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: PunkFinance/punk.protocol | Score: 0.35 merge probability

item.title: [$3000] Building Yield Strategy for DeFi 401(k)
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: PunkFinance/punk.protocol | Score: 0.45 merge probability

item.title: [$6000] Building & Coding BTC Yield Strategy
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: PunkFinance/punk.protocol | Score: 0.45 merge probability

item.title: [$500] Injective Solo AI Builder Sprint
item.description: Source: buidlbox | Repo: None | Score: 0.2 merge probability

item.title: [$115000] Arbitrum Open House London: Online Buildathon
item.description: Source: buidlbox | Repo: None | Score: 0.1 merge probability

item.title: [$14000] MetaMask Smart Accounts Kit x 1Shot API x Venice AI Dev Cook Off

item.title: [$3000] [ Bounty $3k ] [ Research ] Collect and compare AI-generated AGI architecture proposals
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: aLexzzz430/Cognitive-OS | Score: 0.55 merge probability

item.title: [$3000] [Bounty] @tomisnotcat — ARM architecture details needed (5 RTC)
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: Scottcjn/Rustchain | Score: 0.1 merge probability

item.title: [$6000] [ Bounty $6k ] [ Deploy ] Validate feature flag defaults before production rollout — config safety
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: orchestration-agent/AgentOrchestration | Score: 0.68 merge probability

item.title: [$1] Implement a fully functional Admin Panel
item.description: Source: algora | Repo: bug-bounty/bug-bounty | Score: None merge probability

item.title: [$1000] EC testablity interface
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: Dasharo/dasharo-issues | Score: 0.45 merge probability

item.title: [$500] Bounty: Fast parallel scan (Mamba, etc).
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: tinygrad/tinygrad | Score: 0.74 merge probability

item.title: [$1] Add `is_extended_promotional ` column to components (from data source)
item.description: Source: algora | Repo: jlcsearch/jlcsearch | Score: None merge probability

item.title: [$20] [Project Tracker] Sensor configuration display UI
item.description: Source: algora | Repo: PX4-Autopilot/PX4-Autopilot | Score: None merge probability

item.title: [$20] feat(oauth): add generic oidc provider
item.description: Source: algora | Repo: coolify/coolify | Score: None merge probability

item.title: [$6] [ Bounty $6k ] [ Docker ] Remove build arguments from final layers — image metadata
item.description: Source: algora | Repo: AgentOrchestration/AgentOrchestration | Score: None merge probability

item.title: [$9] [ Bounty $9k ] [ Runtime ] Stop retry loop after terminal run state — retry runtime
item.description: Source: algora | Repo: AgentOrchestration/AgentOrchestration | Score: None merge probability

item.title: [$15] Meme Bounty: Post RustChain Memes on Social Media (2 RTC each)
item.description: Source: github_label | Repo: Scottcjn/rustchain-bounties | Score: 0.5 merge probability
